description.ko: 심해의 고압 환경 속에서 생물 발광 생명체들이 펼치는 평화롭고 신비로운 춤.
description.en: A serene look into the deep sea, featuring bioluminescent life and high-tech submersibles in a high-pressure environment.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Abyssal Cathedral.' A cluster of organic research pods in the #000080 midnight zone. Massive #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with #48D1CC cyan tendrils drift past, pulsing with internal light. The #006994 deep sea water is thick with marine snow and micro-bubbles. High-tech floodlights illuminate hydrothermal vents. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful dance of transparent life.
